title: SCPN Control: Neuro-Symbolic Stochastic Petri Net Controller for Plasma Control
description: Standalone neuro-symbolic control engine that compiles Stochastic Petri Nets into spiking neural network controllers with contract-based verification. Features JAX-accelerated transport, neural equilibrium, and full Grad-Shafranov solver (GPU + autodiff), neural transport surrogate, PPO reinforcement learning agent (beats MPC and PID), real-time adaptive Kuramoto coupling, Lyapunov stability guard, H-infinity observer, and WebSocket phase streaming. 57 Python modules, 5 Rust crates, 2,417 tests (99.99% coverage), 26 CI jobs.
notes: Part of the SCPN (Self-Consistent Phenomenological Network) research framework by ANULUM. v0.14.0: PPO 500K cloud training beats MPC (143.7 vs 58.1) and PID (-912.3) with 0% disruption rate. v0.13.0: JAX-differentiable Grad-Shafranov solver (jax.grad through full Picard iteration). v0.12.0: QLKNN-10D trained neural transport model, PPO agent on Gymnasium TokamakEnv.
